headline: Is Domino's Pizza Stock Too Cheap Here? Analysts Think So
summary: Domino's Pizza Inc. stock has fallen since its April 27 earnings release. It delivered strong free cash flow and FCF margins. Moreover, analysts have higher price targets. One play is to sell short nearby put options.
